name: WW Chocolate Banana Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the peanut butter and honey together.
2. Stir in the Rice Krispies to form a crust.
3. Press the crust into a 9-inch pie pan.
4. Mix the chocolate pudding with skim milk according to package instructions.
5. Slice the banana and place over the crust.
6. Pour the pudding mixture over the banana slices.
7. Chill until ready to serve.
8. Makes 4 servings. Each serving = 1 fat, 1/2 fruit, 1 protein, 1/4 bread, 1/2 milk and 45 optional calories.
